confirmed_schema.searchTerms: array of strings — NOT keywords string

zero_result_runs.diagnosis: Wrong field name: actor expects 'searchTerms' array, not 'keywords' string. Silently returns 0 results with no error when wrong field is used.

openclawai/job-board-scraper.notes: searchTerms[] required. 'keywords' string field silently returns 0 results. Discovered 2026-06-26 via trial-and-error. Split keyword string into array of terms. URL field is 'url'.

orgupdate/job-posting-scraper.notes: ATS board scraper. URL likely in 'jobUrl' field.

thirdwatch/naukri-jobs-scraper.notes: Naukri dedicated scraper. URL field is likely 'jobUrl' — update url_field after first live run confirms correct key.

thirdwatch/cutshort-jobs-scraper.notes: Cutshort scraper. URL likely in 'url' field.

blackfalcondata/wellfound-scraper.notes: Wellfound scraper. URL likely in 'startupUrl' field — update after first live run.

k1ra/indeed-jobs-scraper.notes: Indeed India scraper. URL likely in 'url' field.

source_quirks.linkedin: JD text is almost always empty from Apify scrapers — LinkedIn aggressively blocks JD extraction. has_jd will be false for most LinkedIn jobs. Use keyword_score only; set semantic_score=30 as neutral baseline. Do NOT tailor resume for no-JD jobs.
source_quirks.remoteok: tags field contains tech stack — already appended to jd_full by scraper. has_jd should be true for most Remote OK jobs.
source_quirks.hackernews: Free-form comment text, not structured JDs. Parse the full text field. Quality varies widely — treat HN scores with lower confidence.
source_quirks.weworkremotely: RSS description is often short HTML. has_jd may be marginal — accept anything > 100 chars.
source_quirks.naukri: URL field is 'jobUrl' in thirdwatch actor output — confirmed in url_field. Fallback: search URL built from role+company slug.
source_quirks.cutshort: URL field is 'url'. Fallback: cutshort.io/jobs search.
source_quirks.wellfound: URL field is 'startupUrl'. Fallback: wellfound.com/jobs search.
source_quirks.indeed: URL field is 'url'. Fallback: indeed.co.in search.
